problem id: e6af8e6f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  00001111 -> 11110000
  01011001 -> 10010000
  10100100 -> 01000001
  00110111 -> 01110000
  11100110 -> 01100001
  11000001 -> 00010001
  01000100 -> 01000000
  01100110 -> 01100000
  01100100 -> 01000000

query: 10000001
predicted answer: 00010001
